{
  ModelsEmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
public static class ModelsEmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions
{
    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> EmailColumn(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<global::Models.Employee, string>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Email, configuration);

    public static void EmailHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Models.Employee, string> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Email);

    public static void EmailRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder, Func<global::Models.Employee, string, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Email);

    public static void EmailInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Email);

    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> AgeColumn(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<global::Models.Employee, int>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Age, configuration);

    public static void AgeHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Models.Employee, int> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Age);

    public static void AgeRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder, Func<global::Models.Employee, int, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Age);

    public static void AgeInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Employee> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Age);
}
,
  ModelsProductSheetBuilderExtensions.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
public static class ModelsProductSheetBuilderExtensions
{
    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> NameColumn(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<global::Models.Product, string>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Name, configuration);

    public static void NameHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Models.Product, string> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Name);

    public static void NameRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder, Func<global::Models.Product, string, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Name);

    public static void NameInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Name);

    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> PriceColumn(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<global::Models.Product, decimal>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Price, configuration);

    public static void PriceHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Price, value);

    public static void PriceOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Price, value);

    public static void PriceWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Price, value);

    public static void PriceHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Price, value);

    public static void PriceCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Models.Product, decimal> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Price, value);

    public static void PriceFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Price, value);

    public static void PriceNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Price, value);

    public static void PriceIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Price);

    public static void PriceRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder, Func<global::Models.Product, decimal, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Price, value);

    public static void PriceFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Price);

    public static void PriceInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Price, value);

    public static void PriceExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Models.Product> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Price);
}

}
